evals.prompt: Look up Su Shi (蘇軾) in CBDB and tell me about his official positions and social relationships
evals.expected_output: Biographical info for Su Shi including official positions and social relationships extracted from CBDB API JSON response
expectations: The API was queried using Chinese characters 蘇軾 (not URL-encoded hex)
The response was parsed correctly — BasicInfo, PostingInfo, and SocialAssocInfo data extracted
Official positions are listed with names and/or years
Social relationships are listed with names and relationship types

evals.prompt: I have CBDB person ID 1762 — can you pull up their biographical info and tell me what dynasty they lived in?
evals.expected_output: Biographical info for person ID 1762 with dynasty information
expectations: The API was queried using id=1762 parameter
The person is identified as Wang Anshi (王安石)
The dynasty is clearly stated (Song/宋/Northern Song/北宋)
Birth and death years are included (1021-1086)

evals.prompt: Find information about a historical Chinese scholar named Wang Anshi using the CBDB database
evals.expected_output: Biographical data for Wang Anshi from CBDB, potentially handling multiple results
expectations: The API was queried with the name Wang Anshi (Pinyin or Chinese characters)
The correct Wang Anshi (王安石) was identified from results
Key biographical details were presented (dates, dynasty, positions)
